items: Welcome by the School Board President, Alisa MacAvoy
Additions, Deletions or Modifications to the agenda.

If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on: (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd3rKbPfVCTpOsK5ILqjnU2u-h- NuNx-vUq4OZxYNVR8lc4aQ/viewform?usp=sf_link) prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Multiple changes announced: Items 7.1, 7.2, and 7.3 moved to consent (section 6); 10.1 (grand jury response) moved to consent; continuation of study session conversation moved to after 8.2 as new item 8.2A/8.3
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Roll call vote, please. Trustee Wells. Aye. Trustee Lawson. Aye. Tracy Marquez. Aye. Vice President Diasokum. Aye. President Macavoy. Aye.

items.intro_words: All right, roll call, please. Trustee Wells. Here. Trustee Lawson.
It's November 17, 2021. School board meeting. Thank you all for being here.
All right, do I have any changes to the agenda? I have one three proposed changes.
Do I have a motion to approve? So moved. Second. All right, Maria, and then Mike, roll called out, please.
All right, I do not see any oral communication comments. All right, so we're on to the bond program consent items.
All right, 7.4. Does anyone have any questions on this resolution?
Right, okay, so we're on to 8.1. Discussion of reconvening North Star Forward Committee. Yes, we are.
Right, okay, so we're on to the presentation regarding potential trustee area revision. Yes, and I believe Joss Chisholm is with us now.
So it looks like you don't need a formal vote on this. No, I don't. I just want direction.
So back to the food service to kind of just close out that conversation because we had heard from the presenters and we heard from those who wanted to comment to the board and staff.
All right, so we are on to. We have a number of board policies in front of you.
All right, so this is 8.3 regarding uniform complaint Procedures. And just for the audience and staff that may be listening in, this information, of course, is published last Friday.
Great. So the second.the second. This item 8.4 is regarding staff development.
Moving ahead to 8.5. This board policy is an update. So we had one in place, of course, regarding suspensions and expulsion and due process accordingly.
Okay. Moving forward. 8.6. This actually is a new policy for the redwood City school district.

Okay. And the next one goes hand in hand as well. This is 8.7. This is really a new policy once again, but practices have been put in place regarding the link between parentally placed privacy school student and the services that are being offered.
All right, so we're on to the consent items to have a motion to approve. So moved.
And as a reminder, we had moved 10.1 to consent that we just approved. So 10.2 is resolution 17, which is authorizing the electronic meetings of the board trustees during the state of emergency.
All right, great. So do I have a motion to approve? So moved. I think Janet seconded it.
All right. Board and superintendent reports. I have none. Since last week.

All right, anything else? Okay, so information. We don't have it. Correspondence. Been getting a few emails here, and they are mostly around the child nutrition service and about one of our school sites.
And then other business suggested items for future agenda. All right, and then board agenda, calendar.
Do I have a motion to adjourn? Second. All right, Cecilia. And then Mike is a second.
